channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: INJ eyes a breakout: risk sits under $3.00, reward target $3.20-$3.40 by month-end. 🚀 If resistance at $3.01 flips, bulls gain traction. https://Blockchain.News/news/20260409-price-prediction-inj-targets-320-340-by-month-end #crypto #INJ #DeFi

item.title: Toncoin eyes $1.30 this month—but bears aren’t done. 🔥 Break above $1.26 with volume or see risk of a slide to $1.18. 🚩 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260409-ton-price-prediction-targets-130-resistance-by-month-end #Toncoin #Crypto #PricePrediction
